name: newtype-codex
description: newtype content-team workflow for Codex, packaged as reusable skills plus custom agent templates.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent content workflows for research, writing, editing, fact-checking, and archiving.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native packaging of newtype's content-team workflow. It bundles workflow skills and custom agent templates while intentionally leaving out OpenCode-specific runtime integration. Codex plugins currently install skills automatically; custom agents must be installed with the included installer.
defaultPrompt: Use newtype-chief to coordinate the newtype content team for researching and drafting an article.
Continue the content workflow with newtype.
